AccessLegacyPartnerCentral.name: AccessLegacyPartnerCentral

AccessMarketingCentral.description: Grants permission to Single Sign-On from AWS Partner Central into Marketing Central

AssociatePartnerAccount.description: Grants permission to associate Partner account to AWS account

AssociatePartnerUser.description: Grants permission to associate Partner user to IAM role

DisassociatePartnerUser.description: Grants permission to disassociate Partner user to IAM role
